name: Victron GX / CCGX Modbus TCP Registerliste 3.73
description: Preset aus der Victron Modbus-TCP-Registerliste 3.73. com.victronenergy.system nutzt Unit-ID 100, alle anderen Services sind auf Unit-ID 1 gemappt und müssen ggf. pro Installation angepasst werden.
author: homeESS / MyKaefer Apps

registers.name: Serial (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Serial | Bereich: 12 characters | Hinweis: System value -> MAC address of CCGX (represented as string)

registers.name: CCGX Relay 1 state
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Relay/0/State | Bereich: 0 to 1 | Werte: 0=Open;1=Closed

registers.name: CCGX Relay 2 state
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Relay/1/State | Bereich: 0 to 1 | Werte: 0=Open;1=Closed | Hinweis: Relay 1 is available on Venus GX only.

registers.name: PV - AC-coupled on output L1
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Ac/PvOnOutput/L1/Power | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Hinweis: Summation of all AC-Coupled PV Inverters on the output

registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Ac/Genset/L3/Power | Bereich: -32768 to 32767

registers.name: Active input source
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Ac/ActiveIn/Source | Bereich: 0 to 32768 | Werte: 0=Unknown;1=Grid;2=Generator;3=Shore power;240=Not connected | Hinweis: 0 indicates that there is an active input, but it is not configured under Settings → System setup.

registers.name: System time in UTC
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: INTERNAL | Bereich: 0 to 18446744073709551615

registers.name: GX firmware major version
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: INTERNAL | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Hinweis: Render in hexadecimal to get the text version

registers.name: GX firmware beta release
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: INTERNAL | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Hinweis: This is zero for official releases.

registers.name: Battery Voltage (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/Voltage | Bereich: 0 to 6553.5 | Hinweis: Battery Voltage determined from different measurements. In order of preference: BMV-voltage (V), Multi-DC-Voltage (CV), MPPT-DC-Voltage (ScV), Charger voltage

registers.name: Battery Current (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/Current | Bereich: -3276.8 to 3276.7 | Hinweis: Postive: battery begin charged. Negative: battery being discharged

registers.name: Battery Power (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/Power | Bereich: -32768 to 32767 | Hinweis: Postive: battery begin charged. Negative: battery being discharged

registers.name: Battery State of Charge (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/Soc | Bereich: 0 to 100 | Hinweis: Best battery state of charge, determined from different measurements.

registers.name: Battery state (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/State | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Werte: 0=idle;1=charging;2=discharging

registers.name: Battery Consumed Amphours (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/ConsumedAmphours | Bereich: 0 to -6553.6

registers.name: Battery Time to Go (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Battery/TimeToGo | Bereich: 0 to 6553600 | Hinweis: Special value: 0 = charging

registers.name: PV - DC-coupled power

registers.name: DC System Power

registers.name: VE.Bus charge current (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Vebus/Current | Bereich: -3276.8 to 3276.7 | Hinweis: Current flowing from the Multi to the dc system. Negative: the other way around.

registers.name: VE.Bus charge power (System)
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.system | DBus-Pfad: /Dc/Vebus/Power | Bereich: -32768 to 32767 | Hinweis: System value etc. AND: Positive: power flowing from the Multi to the dc system. Negative: the other way around.

registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.vebus | DBus-Pfad: /Soc | Bereich: 0 to 6553.5 | Unit-ID ist bei Victron je Gerät/DeviceInstance installationsabhängig; Standard im Preset ist 1 und muss ggf. angepasst werden.

registers.name: VE.Bus state
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.vebus | DBus-Pfad: /State | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Werte: 0=Off;1=Low Power;2=Fault;3=Bulk;4=Absorption;5=Float;6=Storage;7=Equalize;8=Passthru;9=Inverting;10=Power assist;11=Power supply;244=Sustain;252=External control | Unit-ID ist bei Victron je Gerät/DeviceInstance installationsabhängig; Standard im Preset ist 1 und muss ggf. angepasst werden.

registers.name: VE.Bus Error
registers.description: DBus-Service: com.victronenergy.vebus | DBus-Pfad: /VebusError | Bereich: 0 to 65536 | Werte: 0=No error;1=VE.Bus Error 1: Device is switched off because one of the other phases in the system has switched off;2=VE.Bus Error 2: New and old types MK2 are mixed in the system;3=VE.Bus Error 3: Not all- or more than- the expected devices were found in the system;4=VE.Bus Error 4: No other device whatsoever detected;5=VE.Bus Error 5: Overvoltage on AC-out;6=VE.Bus Error 6: Error in DDC Program;7=VE.Bus BMS connected- which requires an Assistant- but no assistant found;10=VE.Bus Error 10: System time synchronisation problem occurred;14=VE.Bus Error 14: Device cannot transmit data;16=VE.Bus Error 16: Dongle missing;17=VE.Bus Error 17: One of the devices assumed master status because the original master failed;18=VE.Bus Error 18: AC Overvoltage on the output of a slave has occurred while already switched off;22=VE.Bus Error 22: This device cannot function as slave;24=VE.Bus Error 24: Switch-over system protection initiated;25=VE.Bus Error 25: Firmware incompatibility. For DVCC, use 2705 instead. | Unit-ID ist bei Victron je Gerät/DeviceInstance installationsabhängig; Standard im Preset ist 1 und muss ggf. angepasst werden.

registers.name: ESS max discharge current (fractional)

The control-loop will use this value to limit the multi power setpoint. Currently a value < 50% will disable discharge completely. >=50% allows. Consider using 2704 instead. | Unit-ID ist bei Victron je Gerät/DeviceInstance installationsabhängig; Standard im Preset ist 1 und muss ggf. angepasst werden.
